title: BOARDMAN FOOD PANTRY - 211info
text: BOARDMAN FOOD PANTRY BOARDMAN FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a food pantry and toiletry items to those in need. Food, toiletry, and financial donations accepted. Volunteers welcomed. 314 Locust Road SW Boardman, OR 97818 Eligibility: Unrestricted. One food box per household per week. Hours: Monday 9:30am-11am, Thursday 6pm-7pm Email (541) 219-9535 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 219-9535 Main phone Main phone (541) 219-9535 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Food: Walk in or call for an emergency delivery. You can designate an alternate person to pick up for you by submitting and signing a permission form. ID required. Donations: Drop off during service hours or call to schedule a time. See donation link on website for financial donations. Volunteers: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Morrow County Services: Food Donation Programs Food Pantries Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Volunteer Opportunities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
